title: lagenaria siceraria var. depressa
intro: Lagenaria siceraria var. depressa, also known as the calabash or bottle gourd, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lagenaria siceraria var. depressa include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
